fields.name: translationKey
fields.label: Translation key
fields.description: Lowercase kebab-case identifier shared by every translation.

fields.name: publishedAt
fields.label: Published on
fields.description: Use YYYY-MM-DD. Required for published content.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.label: Updated on
fields.description: Use YYYY-MM-DD when the public content changes materially.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Aim for a concise description suitable for search results.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Social sharing image
fields.description: Use a JPEG or PNG image, ideally 1200 × 630 px.

fields.name: imageAlt
fields.label: Social image alternative text
fields.description: Required when a social sharing image is provided.
